interesting_facts.text: First time Alito and Gorsuch are sole dissenters on a case, they agree 86% of the time — Esteras v. United States
First time Kagan is the sole dissenter — Trump v. New York

First time Sotomayor is the sole dissenter — U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service v. Sierra Club
